# Cloaks
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Cloaks&prop=wikitext

'''Cloaks''' are used by [[Rogue|Rogues]], and allow them to turn {{i|e|Invisible|invisible}}.

==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this [https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/cloaks link].

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Destructor Cloak|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Cloak of the 1000 Oceans|h}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Shadow Scales|a}}
|}
===Galactic {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Deepspace Veil|g}}
|}
